evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Full documentation, startup guides & API references can be found at [docs.vlt.sh](https://docs.vlt.sh).

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: See the [contributing guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for more information on how to build and develop the various workspaces.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Below you can find a complete table of each workspace available in this repository and its corresponding license:

evidence.title: v1.0.0-rc.18
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * cli-sdk: hydrate cli options by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1441 * graph: preserve lockfile custom resolved values by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1440 * fix(docs): add frontmatter to md files that are linked to by @lukekarrys in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1446 * cli-sdk: add view count option by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1445 * graph: avoid lockfile empty registries key by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1447 * chore: update lockfile by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1442 * chore: revert benchmark action runners by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1448 * Release v1.0.0-rc.18 by @vltops in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1443 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/compare/v1.0.0-rc.17...v1.0.0-rc.18

evidence.title: v1.0.0-rc.17
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * graph: fix idempotent peer dep installs by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1436 * Release v1.0.0-rc.17 by @vltops in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1438 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/compare/v1.0.0-rc.16...v1.0.0-rc.17

evidence.title: v1.0.0-rc.16
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * chore(infra): revert to ubuntu-latest for project workflow by @darcyclarke in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1431 * types: memoize normalize manifests by @ruyadorno in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1433 * Release v1.0.0-rc.16 by @vltops in https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/pull/1432 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vltpkg/vltpkg/compare/v1.0.0-rc.15...v1.0.0-rc.16
